title: Do I have to keep changing the Redirect URL for Monday Code app
excerpt: Every time I deploy to Monday Code I get a new Version URL. Do I need to copy this to the Redirect URL or is there some way this is taken care of?

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: Every time I deploy to Monday Code I get a new Version URL. Do I need to copy this to the Redirect URL or is there some way this is taken care of?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s a permanent URL you can use for redirects back to your app.

Takes the form:

https://live1-service-1234567-aa1231a12.region.monday.app

Get the URL but clicking here:

Screenshot 2024-10-21 at 14.35.11614×298 10.5 KB

You can save this as an environment variable like so:

Screenshot 2024-10-21 at 14.28.353620×1534 236 KB

then access it in your code using EnvironmentVariablesManager from @mondaycom/apps-sdk.

If you’ve gone to multi-region, then you’ll have to add each ORIGIN to each region.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Also, you shouldn’t get a new URL on deploy. Only on release of a new version.

What command are you using to deploy???

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you David. You’re right and what I should have asked about was whether I had to copy the URL for every release (not deploy). Incidentally I use mapps code:push to deploy but it is the release that concerns me.
